name: env_continuity_dedup_v2
description: Regression test for environmental continuity fact bloat. Walks east 8 times from a fixed starting premise on Main Street, then verifies that the injection-time dedup pass in assembleContinuityPacket keeps the continuity block under 1000 characters. The pre-patch behavior would grow continuity_block_chars to ~1700+ after 8 walks due to 20+ near-duplicate env facts.
world_prompt: A quiet town on a warm afternoon. Main Street has cracked pavement, faded facades with peeling paint, a red-and-white awning over a shop door, and a rusted mailbox with its flag at half-mast. Weeds push through the concrete seams.

turns.action: I am standing on Main Street in a quiet town, in front of a row of weathered buildings with cracked pavement and a red-and-white awning. A rusted mailbox stands crooked nearby.
